sections.paragraph:
to press, to press upon. Part. pass. מָעוּךְ an animal castrated by pressing or bruising the testicles, Lev 22:24. 1Sa 26:7, חֲנִיתֹו מְעוּכָה־בָאָרֶץ “his spear was pressed into (i.e. fixed in) the ground.”

Pual, to be pressed, used of the breasts immodestly pressed, Eze 23:3. Hence pr.n. מָעֹוךְ, and-
